message:
feat(ft-api): add logspace, empty, tensordot, kron, cross, vecdot, diag_embed, unique, and unique_consecutive

Expand tensor factory and linear algebra API:
- Factory: logspace, empty, empty_like
- Contraction: tensordot (generalised matrix multiply with dim contracting)
- Products: kron (Kronecker product for 1D/2D), cross (3-element cross product),
  vecdot (batched dot product along last dimension)
- Embedding: diag_embed (vector to diagonal matrix with offset support)
- Dedup: unique (sorted/unsorted with inverse/counts), unique_consecutive

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
